text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Tokai Teio crouching down behind the
school building, so I head over to see what's up.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I haven't seen Prez in like forever!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I go to the student council office every day, but she's never there!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: There's so much I wanna talk to her about...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I get that she's busy, but still... Ugh. Wonder
when I'll be able to see her again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like not being able to see Symboli Rudolf
is really stressing out Tokai Teio. She lets out a
deep sigh.
